title: Hash Brown Cakes with Smoky Sauce
description: A crispy potato cake recipe with a smoky twist. Perfect as a side dish or snack.
instructions: Grate the potatoes and squeeze out excess moisture.
In a bowl, mix the grated potatoes with hash brown, butter, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Heat a non-stick pan with a small amount of oil over medium heat.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the potato mixture and shape into patties.
Cook the patties for 4-5 minutes on each side or until golden brown.
Reduce heat to low and simmer the smoky sauce in a separate pan.
Serve the hash brown cakes with smoky sauce on top.
Garnish with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
